title: Final review of test-debt epic diff
description: Meta-work tick per convention (claude-runner.md, Meta-work ticks): review the epic diff — assertion quality (no gutted tests, no overbroad skips), hermetic-mock soundness, CI changes. Severity policy applies: blocker=fix before close-out, should-fix=fix or accept in retro, nit=opportunistic.
acceptance_criteria: Findings resolved or accepted; go test -short ./... and pnpm test green
closed_reason: Final review (opus, per reviewer-tier rule): VERDICT CLEAN — coverage preserved (parser invariants still catch regressions), skip-gates verified collection-time-safe with 1s probe timeout, dialog tests meaningful, error test deterministic, CI config verified incl. package_json_file input; no drift, no new type errors (108 vs 109 baseline)
